query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN enrichmentStatus = 'enriched' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as enriched, SUM(CASE WHEN enrichmentStatus = 'pending' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as pending, SUM(CASE WHEN email IS NOT NULL AND email != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_email FROM contacts;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user HWMKhVWm4R1gayY.38561a93bc5c --database 3SMu786VMCWdCnmNSx6pxw --execute SELECT COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN enrichmentStatus = 'enriched' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as enriched, SUM(CASE WHEN enrichmentStatus = 'pending' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as pending, SUM(CASE WHEN email IS NOT NULL AND email != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_email FROM contacts;
